rationale: The cited paper (“Broadcasting and Narrowcasting: How Audience Size Affects What People Share”) is topically related to the citing paper’s word-of-mouth domain and could plausibly be used as prior mechanism/channel literature, consistent with the citing note that prior NWOM work examined communication channels. However, the provided evidence includes only a DOI-level reference match (no in-text citation context or description of how this specific study is used), so substantive reliance versus background mention cannot be determined safely.
